commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=6598d0fc935f07ed7a6a0e46281c343e8e5a397b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch updates the commit and item review prompts so AGENTS.md is treated as repository policy, adds a repo_policy commit-review finding kind, and adds AGENTS.md reporting guidance.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection of the PR diff against current test/clawsweeper.test.ts shows the AGENTS prompt test would fail, and the malformed Markdown line is visible in the diff. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
commands.review_followup: Not a repair-lane candidate while contributor real behavior proof is missing; the branch should first repair the prompt regression and show a real dry-run or prompt-test result.

target.title: Treat AGENTS.md as review policy in ClawSweeper reviews
target.body:
## Summary

- updates the commit-review prompt so `AGENTS.md` is treated as repo policy to evaluate against, not merely instructions for the reviewer to follow
- adds `repo_policy` as a concrete commit-review finding kind for actionable `AGENTS.md` violations
- records whether `AGENTS.md` was read, absent, or not applicable in commit-review reports

## Notes

This intentionally does not add `clawsweeper.md` behavior.

The same AGENTS.md rubric adjustment should also be made to `prompts/review-item.md`, but that file is large enough that this connector truncated the fetched content before I could safely round-trip it. I removed the temporary docs note and kept this PR focused on the safely updated commit-review prompt.

## Validation

- Not run locally. This environment cannot clone the repo or run pnpm checks because outbound git/network resolution is unavailable.
- Relying on GitHub CI for validation.
target.author: takhoffman

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
